title: Parallax sanctioned contract amendment (v0.37 P0.4)
description: One record per determinate, evidence-backed contract tightening, committed at .parallax/<slug>/amendments/<amendment_id>.json. This is the ONLY sanctioned way to change a frozen contract after freeze: it is limited to mechanical tightening (no product fork, no unresolved ambiguity, no choice between competing behaviour readings). scripts/contract-amend.py verify requires a continuous prev->new hash chain of such records from the frozen contract hash to the current contract bytes; any post-freeze change with no valid chain fails the mechanical guard.

kind.description: The only sanctioned kind. A product fork / ambiguity resolution must go through /parallax:resolve, not this path.

rationale.description: Why the tightening is determinate (the spec under-scoped a mechanical detail with exactly one correct reading).

evidence.description: path:line / source refs proving the under-scope is determinate, not a choice.

prev_contract_hash.description: contract-hash.sh value the amendment tightens FROM.

new_contract_hash.description: contract-hash.sh value the amendment tightens TO (must equal the new frozen bytes).

verdict.description: pre-freeze review re-run on the DELTA; only a pass or an acceptable low-notes snapshot may freeze.

artifact.description: path to the recorded pre-freeze review snapshot of the delta.

propagation.description: Amendment-propagation check: the tightening must be reconciled across every contract surface. All flags must be true to freeze.
